query:
SELECT u.username, u.email, st.name as tier_name, st.monthlyPrice, st.maxVehicles, s.startDate 
FROM `subscriptions` s 
JOIN `users` u ON s.userId = u.id 
JOIN `subscriptionTiers` st ON s.tierId = st.id 
WHERE u.username = 'test11';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3JZ9fT9capQqaJ5.root --database 7Q8gdiHiBpSXUrkFz6JMfV --execute SELECT u.username, u.email, st.name as tier_name, st.monthlyPrice, st.maxVehicles, s.startDate 
FROM `subscriptions` s 
JOIN `users` u ON s.userId = u.id 
JOIN `subscriptionTiers` st ON s.tierId = st.id 
WHERE u.username = 'test11';
